completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit tests run with a fake embed function and require no NAS/network.
completion_promises.evidence: Created comprehensive test suite in test_retrieval_suite.py that uses make_fake_embed(768) for all embedding operations. All 27 tests run with no network or NAS dependencies. The TestEndToEndWithFakeEmbed class specifically validates fake_embed determinism and end-to-end retrieval flow.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validation rejections covered: hyphen project, unknown payload type, malformed domain tag, negative budget, empty (no query + no filter) request.
completion_promises.evidence: Created TestValidationRejections class with 5 tests covering all specified rejection scenarios: test_hyphen_project_rejected, test_unknown_payload_type_rejected, test_malformed_domain_tag_rejected, test_negative_budget_rejected, test_empty_request_rejected. All tests verify proper ValidationError is raised with appropriate error messages.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Filtering/ranking covered: payload-type filter (0/1/3), domain-tag filter, cosine-desc ordering, supersession exclusion + include_superseded marking.
completion_promises.evidence: Created TestFilteringAndRanking class with 7 tests: test_payload_type_filter_zero_returns_all_types (empty filter), test_payload_type_filter_one_returns_only_that_type (single filter), test_payload_type_filter_three_returns_those_types (multiple filters), test_domain_tag_filter_returns_only_tagged_memories, test_cosine_desc_ordering (validates descending score ordering), test_supersession_exclusion_by_default, test_include_superseded_marking.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Budget boundaries covered: exactly-budget, 2100→drop-lowest, zero budget, memory-larger-than-budget omitted whole, partial-coverage honesty.
completion_promises.evidence: Created TestBudgetBoundaries class with 5 tests: test_exactly_budget_returns_full (content at budget boundary), test_over_budget_drops_lowest_ranked (2100→drop scenario), test_zero_budget_returns_empty, test_memory_larger_than_budget_omitted_whole (validates ASSUM-009), test_partial_coverage_honesty (validates coverage_score reporting).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Security/injection covered: query text resembling a filter is search-text only and still excludes superseded; injection domain tag is rejected.
completion_promises.evidence: Created TestSecurityAndInjection class with 2 tests: test_query_resembling_filter_is_search_text_only (validates query with 'include_superseded=true' is treated as text and doesn't bypass supersession filter), test_injection_domain_tag_rejected (validates SQL injection attempts in domain tags are rejected with ValidationError).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Concurrency/determinism covered (regression): equal-relevance deterministic ordering, supersede-mid-search resolves to one state, repeated concurrent searches over an unchanged corpus return identical blocks.
completion_promises.evidence: Created TestConcurrencyAndDeterminism class with 3 tests: test_equal_relevance_deterministic_ordering (validates tie-breaking on natural_key for equal scores), test_supersede_mid_search_resolves_to_one_state (validates deduplication when same key appears in multiple states), test_repeated_concurrent_searches_return_identical_blocks (executes 5 concurrent asyncio.gather searches and validates all return identical results).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Degradation covered: embed unavailable and store unreachable both fail cleanly with credential-free messages.
completion_promises.evidence: Created TestDegradation class with 2 tests: test_embed_unavailable_fails_cleanly_without_credentials (simulates EmbedServiceError and validates error message contains no passwords or DSN), test_store_unreachable_fails_cleanly_without_credentials (simulates TimeoutError from store and validates credential hygiene in error message).
